CustomField.description: Template for generated file names. Supports placeholders: {{param:ParameterName}}, {{date:FORMAT}}, {{field:FieldPath}}. Example: Invoice_{{field:Account.Name}}_{{date:YYYY-MM-DD}}
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Use {{param:Name}} for parameters, {{date:YYYY-MM-DD}} for dates, {{field:Name}} for record fields. Leave blank for default naming.
CustomField.label: File Name Template
